_comment: Factory calibration of the wrist D435i (serial below), captured live via
pyrealsense2 on the NUC on 2026-07-23 for the Fast-FoundationStereo depth
integration.  Used by docker/ffs_service/ffs_depth_service.py to convert
left-IR disparity to metric depth and register it into the COLOR optical
frame.  Regenerate with the rs_stereo_capture probe if the camera module is
ever replaced or recalibrated (the relay cross-checks live camera_info and
fails closed on mismatch).  rotation is column-major (rs.extrinsics layout).
